mapper.select: SELECT d.discussion_id AS discussionId, d.content, d.created_at AS createdAt, CONCAT(N'同学', CHAR(64 + DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY d.student_id))) AS anonymousName FROM dbo.discussions d WHERE d.assignment_id = #{assignmentId} ORDER BY d.created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dbo.discussions (assignment_id, student_id, content) VALUES (#{assignmentId}, #{studentId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.submissions WHERE assignment_id = #{assignmentId} AND student_id = #{studentId}
